title: Gravity Anchor
effect: Reduces fall damage by 80% and stabilizes footing on unstable ledges.

title: Echo Dampener
effect: Muffles sound in a wide radius, preventing echoes from alerting nearby dwellers.

title: Lumen Core
effect: Emits a steady glow in total darkness and slowly recharges from ambient minerals.

title: Chasm Grapple
effect: Fires a retractable line across gaps, letting you cross collapsed bridges safely.

title: Depth Rebreather
effect: Filters toxic air found in the silent depths, extending safe exploration time.
